---
title: "Explorations"
---

All explorations — finished, cancelled, in-progress, or not started.

## Warming Acceleration

::: {.align-center .text-xl}
[prose](./warming-acceleration/prose/is-there-a-hiatus.qmd) ·
[draft](./warming-acceleration/draft/01-global-kinematics.qmd) ·
[log](./warming-acceleration/log/index.qmd)
:::

<style>
.align-center {
  text-align: center;
}
.text-xl {
  font-size: 1.25rem;
}
</style>

Do global lakes exhibit heterogeneous warming acceleration — or deceleration —
across space and time, and what drives it?

92,245 lakes, GLAST dataset, 1981–2020.

Methods: STL decomposition, STARS regime shifts, K-means clustering,
teleconnection attribution.

The question began with the global warming hiatus as a starting point,
but the focus has broadened to the full spatiotemporal structure of
lake warming heterogeneity.
